title: fix: case-insensitive URL matching in BYOP app-lookup
author: voodoohop

gist.headline: Case closed on app URLs
gist.blurb: We've smoothed out a tiny wrinkle in our Bring Your Own Prompt (BYOP) app lookup. Mixed-case URLs will no longer cause attribution hiccups, ensuring every app gets the credit it deserves.
gist.summary: Updated the BYOP app lookup system to use case-insensitive URL matching, preventing attribution loss for apps registered with mixed-case URLs.
gist.impact: App developers will reliably receive attribution for their usage regardless of how their URL casing is formatted.
gist.visual_concept: The PR fixes case sensitivity in URLs. Visual metaphor: Polly the bee and the Monitor Robot organizing mixed-case alphabet blocks, making sure they all match perfectly.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot and a chunky monitor-head robot organizing glowing alphabet blocks of different sizes. The robot's screen displays a lime green (#ecf874) checkmark. Soft pastel gradient background with warm lighting. Chunky retro sprites, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley, emotionally warm and nostalgic.
